name: Dropbox Sign
description: Dropbox Sign (formerly HelloSign) is a straightforward e-signature platform known for its clean interface and easy embeddable API. Owned by Dropbox, it integrates natively with Dropbox storage and is popular with SMBs and developers.
cons: Less powerful than DocuSign for enterprise
use_cases: You need to embed a signing flow directly inside your own app or product using the API without customers leaving your platform
Your team already uses Dropbox for document storage and wants e-signatures that integrate natively without extra connectors
You send a moderate volume of contracts — NDAs, proposals, SOWs — and want a simple, affordable alternative to DocuSign
You need reusable document templates so your team can send standard agreements in seconds rather than reformatting each time
